title: Arrays
why: The base layer for implementation, hashing, prefix sums, and two pointers.

title: Sliding Window
why: High-frequency interview pattern for substring and subarray optimization.

title: Trees
why: Tests recursion, state passing, DFS/BFS, and parent-child invariants.

title: Graphs
why: Core CP and interview area covering BFS, DFS, shortest paths, and connectivity.

title: Dynamic Programming
why: Turns repeated subproblems into structured recurrence and memory decisions.
